title: Bridge Essay: Internal senses of the vagus nerve.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Internal senses of the vagus nerve.** — Neuron (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2021.12.020. PMID: 35051375. The vagus nerve is an indispensable body-brain connection that controls vital aspects of autonomic physiology like breathing, heart rate, blood pressure, and gut motility, reflexes like coughing and swallowing, and survival behaviors like feeding, drinking, and sickness responses. Classical physiological studies and recent molecular/genetic approaches have revealed a tremendous diversity of vagal sensory neuron types that innervate different internal organs, with many cell types remaining poorly
